title: Client contract and signature tracking
description: Shareable $defs block for per-client contract and signature status. Embed in an org's clients-config client.schema.json to track MSA/DPA signing state and enable the signed-DPA deploy gate.

contracts.description: Signature status for the agreements this client must have in place before a production deploy. Optional — omit for test/sandbox clients that are never subject to the deploy gate.

agreement.description: Status of a single named agreement (MSA, DPA, etc.).

status.description: Lifecycle state: none=not yet issued; sent=issued awaiting signature; signed=fully executed; superseded=replaced by a newer version (keep the old record; add a new agreement entry).

signed_date.description: ISO 8601 date the agreement was countersigned by both parties (YYYY-MM-DD). Required when status=signed or superseded.

version.description: Agreement version string (e.g. '1.0', '2026-Q2'). Monotonically increasing — bump on each new execution.

signed_original_link.description: Canonical link to the fully executed document (Google Drive URL or path). Treated as an opaque locator — no access check is performed by the deploy gate.

sub_processors_current_as_of.description: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) through which the sub-processor list disclosed in this agreement was accurate. If the live config's sub-processor list has a later change date, the deploy gate fails. Applicable to DPA; omit for MSA.

amendments.description: Ordered list of post-signature amendments (change notices) to this agreement, newest last.

amendment.description: A post-signature change to an agreement (e.g. a §5.3 sub-processor change notice).

note.description: Human-readable summary of what changed (e.g. 'Sub-processor residency changed: Anthropic AU Foundry → Anthropic US direct API').

link.description: Optional link to the signed amendment document (Google Drive URL or path).
